name: trust-coupons
description: Trust-first coupon tester extension and home-server API for CZ/EU merchants.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @trust-coupons/api && npm run build -w @trust-coupons/admin && npm run build -w @trust-coupons/extension
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @trust-coupons/shared && npm run build -w @trust-coupons/config && npm run build -w @trust-coupons/adapters
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
